g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the client connect to this Magento 2 server and what happens at the TCP layer?')
sendPrompt('What does the Nginx frontend proxy do in a Magento 2 Varnish sandwich? Why handle SSL here?')
sendPrompt('How does Varnish cache work with Magento 2? What is the Varnish sandwich pattern and how is it configured?')
sendPrompt('What does the Nginx backend server do in Magento 2, and how does it route to PHP-FPM?')
sendPrompt('How does PHP 8.3-FPM serve Magento 2 requests? What is the FastCGI process model?')
sendPrompt('How does MySQL store Magento 2 data? What are the key database tables and how is it tuned for Magento?')
